seed.description: 25-turn realistic short-term work scenario (sales rep managing weekly deals). Awareness signals are scattered naturally across the dialogue at varying density. Tests whether the agent picks up on preferences in a realistic, moderately noisy setting where most turns are deal-specific work, not preference-related.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: It's Monday — let's go through this week's deal pipeline.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Sure. How many deals are active?

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Eight active. Three at proposal stage, four at negotiation, one closing.
When you summarize deal status, I want a fixed format every time: deal name, stage, ARR, blockers, next step. Always those five fields, in that order.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Understood — five-field format, fixed order, every status summary.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Status on Acme.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply:
- Deal: Acme
- Stage: negotiation
- ARR: 240K
- Blockers: legal review
- Next: send revised MSA Wed

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Status on Beacon.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply:
- Deal: Beacon
- Stage: proposal
- ARR: 80K
- Blockers: procurement timeline
- Next: discovery call Thu

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Tasks for Acme — pull together the revised MSA section on indemnity.
Make sure to flag any liability cap changes for me before sending. I never want to send legal redlines without my eyes on them first.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Confirmed — any liability or legal redlines, I flag first, never send without your review.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Beacon discovery prep — what should I research?
Status on Catalyst.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply:
- Deal: Catalyst
- Stage: closing
- ARR: 410K
- Blockers: signature awaited
- Next: ping CFO Tuesday

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Catalyst is the priority — push hard.
Draft a follow-up email for Catalyst CFO.
Tone should be warm but no fluff. That's how I write to all my customers — friendly but never gushing.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Got it — warm-but-no-fluff tone for all customer comms.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Status on Delta.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply:
- Deal: Delta
- Stage: negotiation
- ARR: 180K
- Blockers: pricing disagreement
- Next: pricing rework call Wed

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Pricing rework — what concessions can we offer?
Echo, Forge, Glow status — give me all three at once.
Rough total ARR across the pipeline?
Quick CRM update — drop Forge to lost, they went with a competitor.
Hmm. Postmortem on Forge — what did we miss?
Loss postmortem rule going forward: every time we lose a deal, generate a structured postmortem (cause, missed signal, lesson). Always.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Got it — automatic structured postmortem on every loss.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Status on Hammer.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply:
- Deal: Hammer
- Stage: proposal
- ARR: 120K
- Blockers: champion changing roles
- Next: rebuild relationship next quarter

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Followup email for Acme on liability cap — draft.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Draft ready. Flagging: I narrowed the liability cap from 12 months fees to 6 months fees per their request — please confirm before I send.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Approved, send it.
End of week — give me the weekly recap.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: PROBE — should follow established rhythm and tone.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: What's the format you use for status?
Closing for the week.

qa_items.question: What format do I want for deal status updates?
qa_items.tester_hint_answer: Five fields in fixed order: deal name, stage, ARR, blockers, next step.

qa_items.question: Can you send legal redlines without my review?
qa_items.tester_hint_answer: No. Always flag any liability or legal redlines for my review before sending.

qa_items.question: What's my preferred tone for customer communications?
qa_items.tester_hint_answer: Warm but no fluff — friendly but not gushing.

qa_items.question: What should you do automatically when a deal is lost?
qa_items.tester_hint_answer: Generate a structured postmortem with cause, missed signal, lesson.
